name: Ria Money Transfer
description_short: Los Angeles, CA: Ria Money Transfer at 639 S Broadway offers check cashing, money transfers, and bill payment services.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer is located at 639 S Broadway in downtown Los Angeles, CA, operating as a standalone check-cashing store. The location is open Monday through Friday from 8 AM to 7 PM and Saturday through Sunday from 8 AM to 6 PM, providing convenient access for Los Angeles residents and workers in the area.

This Los Angeles branch offers check cashing services, domestic money transfers, and bill payment options. You can reach this location at +1 855-355-2141 to confirm current services or ask about rates before visiting.

If you need quick cash services in the Broadway corridor of Los Angeles, this Ria Money Transfer location offers extended hours and straightforward service. Bring a valid government-issued ID and your checks or transfer information for fastest service.
pros: 600,000+ payout locations across 190+ countries enables broad geographic coverage
Multiple sending options (online, app, in-person, WhatsApp) accommodate different user preferences
Multiple receive methods (bank deposit, cash pickup, digital wallet, home delivery, ATM) provide flexibility
Real-time transfer tracking allows senders to monitor transaction status
35+ year operational history with over 1 billion transfers demonstrates established track record
Support for 100+ currencies reduces need for intermediate conversions
High user ratings (4.9/5 on iOS, 4.5/5 on Trustpilot) from verified reviews
cons: Transfer fees vary by corridor and method; promotional rates may not apply to all transactions
Exchange rates are market-dependent and may not be competitive across all currency pairs
Service availability for specific send/receive method combinations depends on country regulations and partnerships
Delivery times not clearly specified on homepage—vary by method and destination
Business and high-volume transfers appear outside scope; designed primarily for personal remittances
best_for: International workers and immigrants sending regular remittances to family abroad
People making casual money transfers to friends and relatives in 190+ countries
Users who prefer mobile-first or social media-integrated transfer options like WhatsApp
Senders who value flexibility in receive methods (cash pickup, bank deposit, or digital wallet)
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best for individuals and immigrants who regularly send money internationally and want flexibility in how they send (online, app, in-person, WhatsApp) and receive funds (bank, cash, digital wallet). The main caveat is that actual fees, exchange rates, and delivery times vary significantly by corridor and method combination, so users should compare costs for their specific route before committing; promotional rates advertised may not apply to all transactions.
services: In-person cash payments at agent locations
meta_description: Ria Money Transfer at 639 S Broadway, Los Angeles, CA. Check cashing & money transfers. Open Mon-Fri 8AM-7PM, Sat-Sun 8AM-6PM.
